properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In this quiet place with You I bow before Your throne I bare the deepest part of me To You and You alone

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I keep no secrets for there is No thought You have not known I bring my best and all the rest To You and lay them down

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: With all my heart I want to love You Lord And live my life each day to know You more All that is in me is Yours completely I'll serve You only with all my heart

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You faithfully supply my needs According to Your plan So help me Lord to seek Your face Before I seek Your hand

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And trust, You know what's best for me When I don't understand Then follow in obedience In every circumstance

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: With all my heart I want to love You Lord And live my life each day to know You more All that is in me is Yours completely I'll serve You, with all my heart
